query:
-- Link via planName containing the service code (e.g. planName like '%AlbyFDocsOut%')
UPDATE phone_numbers pn
JOIN services s ON (
  s.supplierName IN ('ChannelHaus', 'Channel Haus', 'ECN')
  AND (
    LOWER(s.planName) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(pn.providerServiceCode, '_', -1)), '%')
    OR LOWER(s.planName) = LOWER(pn.notes)
  )
)
SET
  pn.customerName = COALESCE(NULLIF(s.customerName,''), pn.customerName),
  pn.customerExternalId = COALESCE(NULLIF(s.customerExternalId,''), pn.customerExternalId),
  pn.serviceExternalId = COALESCE(NULLIF(s.externalId,''), pn.serviceExternalId),
  pn.monthlyCost = COALESCE(NULLIF(s.monthlyCost,0), pn.monthlyCost),
  pn.monthlyRevenue = COALESCE(NULLIF(s.monthlyRevenue,0), pn.monthlyRevenue)
WHERE pn.provider = 'Channel Haus'
  AND (pn.customerName = '' OR pn.customerName IS NULL);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

  pn.customerExternalId = COALESCE(NULLIF(s.customerExternalId,''), pn.customerExternalId),

  pn.monthlyCost = COALESCE(NULLIF(s.monthlyCost,0), pn.monthlyCost),
  pn.monthlyRevenue = COALESCE(NULLIF(s.monthlyRevenue,0), pn.monthlyRevenue)
WHERE pn.provider = 'Channel Haus'
